name: D+Q cognition and mobility pilot in older adults at risk for Alzheimer's disease
summary: Pilot phase 1/2 study testing feasibility, safety, cognition, mobility, and biomarker outcomes after intermittent dasatinib plus quercetin in older adults at risk for Alzheimer's disease.
population: Older adults at risk for Alzheimer's disease.

provenance.note: Triage-level generated record pending source-located extraction.

name: D+Q diabetic kidney disease human senescent-cell biomarker pilot
summary: Preliminary human trial testing whether intermittent dasatinib plus quercetin decreased senescent-cell and SASP-related biomarkers in adipose and skin samples from individuals with diabetic kidney disease.

provenance.note: Triage-level generated record pending source-located extraction.

name: D+Q idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis randomized feasibility and tolerability pilot
summary: Phase 1 randomized, single-blind, single-center pilot trial testing feasibility and tolerability of intermittent dasatinib plus quercetin in idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis.

provenance.note: Triage-level generated record pending source-located extraction.

name: Intermittent D+Q healthspan and lifespan testing in old mice
summary: Preclinical intervention study testing whether intermittent dasatinib plus quercetin improved physical function and post-treatment survival in aged mice.
model_system: Old mouse cohorts treated intermittently with dasatinib plus quercetin.

provenance.note: Triage-level generated record pending source-located extraction.

name: D+Q postmenopausal women bone metabolism phase 2 randomized trial
summary: Phase 2 randomized controlled trial of intermittent senolytic therapy in postmenopausal women. The D+Q versus untreated-control comparison reported in PubMed includes 60 participants, while the ClinicalTrials.gov posted-results record includes 74 participants across D+Q, fisetin, and untreated-control arms.

provenance.note: Abstract reports the D+Q versus control RCT comparison in postmenopausal women.
Registry provides posted outcome and adverse-event modules for the completed phase 2 trial.

name: SToMP-AD D+Q phase 2 registry record
summary: Active-not-recruiting phase 2 ClinicalTrials.gov record for dasatinib plus quercetin to modulate progression of Alzheimer's disease; no posted results were available when checked.
population: Adults with Alzheimer's disease enrolled in the SToMP-AD trial.

provenance.note: Triage-level generated record pending source-located extraction.

name: Fisetin vascular function trial in older adults registry record
summary: Active-not-recruiting phase 1/2 ClinicalTrials.gov record for fisetin to improve vascular function in older adults; no posted results were available when checked.
population: Older adults enrolled in a fisetin vascular function trial.

name: Senolytic drugs discovery-to-translation review
summary: Narrative review used as context for intervention boundaries, translational rationale, candidate senolytic classes, safety constraints, and unresolved clinical-efficacy questions.

provenance.note: Triage-level generated record pending source-located extraction.

name: Senolytic drug discovery from senescent-cell pro-survival networks
summary: Foundational discovery and validation study using senescent-cell transcriptomics, target knockdown, candidate drugs, and in vivo mouse models to test whether senescent cells can be selectively eliminated by small molecules.
model_system: Senescent human and mouse cell systems plus aged, irradiated, and progeroid mouse models treated with dasatinib plus quercetin.

provenance.note: Triage-level generated record pending source-located extraction.
